w:r.w:t: The Kind Farmer and the Clever Cow
Write the first letter of the pictures. (sun, tomato, umbrella, orange)
Tick and color the picture starting with letter ‘u’ (pen, umbrella, orange,)
Backward counting (5 - 0) in the form of fill in the blanks.
Tick and color the few objects.
Draw a picture with letter “v” (vegetable, van or vase).
Draw a picture with letter “v” (vegetable, van or vase).
Tracing of star & first letter of the shape (Small “s”)
Match the letter with pictures. (snake, toy, umbrella, and violin)
Join the dots to make star shape and write 1
Join the dots to make star shape and write 1
Circle the correct letter of pictures. (sun, torch, utensils, vase)
Write the first letter of shapes. (heart, square and star)
OGA will be taken on Monday.
